title: bonania elliptica var. elliptica
intro: Bonania elliptica var. elliptica, also known as the Bonania tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bonania elliptica var. elliptica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In terms of herbal preparations, Bonania elliptica var. elliptica can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
